summary: Tested Knowledge Base and Admin Portfolio Editor features. All 17 backend API tests and 15 frontend E2E tests passed. Knowledge base returns 12 default MOCK articles (3 per category: DeFi, PERP, OPTIONS, MACRO). Admin portfolio editor allows selecting users and editing HOLD/ALTs/HI_RISK groups with Add/Save buttons.
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin@rukos.crypto and test@test.com accounts. Knowledge articles use default MOCK data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Knowledge Base and Admin Portfolio Editor fully tested. Knowledge API returns default MOCK articles from get_default_knowledge() when no custom articles exist. Admin portfolio endpoints allow CRUD on user portfolios with HOLD/ALTs/HI_RISK groups. All data-testid selectors work correctly.

features_tested.admin_portfolio_user_list: PASS - User list in Portfolio section
features_tested.admin_portfolio_add_save: PASS - Add and Save buttons functional

mocked_data_note: Knowledge base returns MOCK default articles. Portfolio returns MOCK positions if no custom data exists.
